language: typescript (Node ESM; strict tsc, vitest, biome). Rewritten from the Python engine — all functionality preserved and verified by the ported suite.

M1.title: Neutral core spine (model, boundary vocab, plan records, config)

M2.title: Python language pack (python3 ast-dump bridge; 4 fixes)

M3.title: Generic OTel backend adapter + real span verify

M4.title: Discovery -> committed config + resolution protocol + drift

M5.title: Harness adapters (Claude Code + Codex; Node CLI hook, no MCP server)

M6.title: TypeScript pack (lexical + TS-compiler precise) + native backends + CI

M7.title: Full TypeScript rewrite (engine→TS; runtime shims stay target-lang assets)

M8.title: CodebaseAdapter axis (4th axis as code: scaffold + registry + example + CLI)

e2e_verified: Both language paths green end-to-end via vitest: TS onboarding (live Node) and Python onboarding (python3 testclient) each prove discover -> classify -> (red) verify -> fix -> (green) verify -> idempotent + coherent trace tree. 102 tests across 14 files; tsc 0 errors; biome clean.

axes.codebase: discovered config (gigaphone.boundaries.yaml) OR a CodebaseAdapter (code) for a known codebase (ADR-0010)

next_task: v2: more bundled CodebaseAdapters (beyond the OpenHands example); richer interprocedural def-use across files; publish the engine package + plugin to the marketplaces.
notes: Structured cross-session state. The engine is now TypeScript (Node); the Python implementation was deleted on the TS-rewrite branch. Language-specific RUNTIME SHIMS (gigaphone.runtime.* for Python targets, @gigaphone/* for TS targets) are imported by the instrumented customer code, so they remain in the target language and ship as assets under assets/runtime/<lang>/ (ADR + ARCHITECTURE.md §4). verify launches python3/node for the respective target. ARCHITECTURE.md §2 layering is enforced by tests/architecture.test.ts.
